delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: This course enhances students' ability to write clear, organized, and grammatically accurate English while building confidence through diverse writing tasks. Students will also reflect on their progress using the CEFR framework to develop a deeper understanding of their writing skills.
aims: This course aims to cultivate students’ ability to craft clear, well‑structured, and grammatically precise English prose. Through a diverse range of writing tasks, students will develop confidence in expressing their ideas with clarity and coherence. Additionally, by engaging with the CEFR framework, learners will be encouraged to reflect on their individual progress, fostering a deeper awareness of their evolving writing skills. Note: actual assignments and activities will be adjusted to the needs of the actual students in the class.
goals: Develop students' ability to write clear, organized, and grammatically accurate English.
Build confidence in expressing ideas through various writing tasks.
Foster reflection on individual progress using the CEFR framework.
textbooks: All materials developed by the instructor.
prereq: This is a required course for all Education students.
prep:
This is a homework‑heavy course that will require students to spend a good deal of time writing
outside of class.
teachers: ◎ デビット レスリー

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－中学校・高校（英語）：英語コミュニケーション

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:

情報に関するリテラシー

コミュニケーション力

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
授業形態
extra.text:

口頭での質疑やディスカッションを含む
授業中や授業時間外のグループワークを含む
